pi_items.verified_value: Year and Month extracted from Date field
pi_items.source: Task description requirement 3: 'Group by Year and Month of the Date field'. verifier.py lines 124-128 parse date and extract year/month: key = (dt.year, dt.month)

privileged_info_summary: The materialize_monthly_revenue task operates on the demodb database using OrientDB. The source data consists of synthetically generated Orders records (~150 records with random dates spanning 2022-2023, prices between $20-$500, and random statuses). The task requires creating a MonthlyStats vertex class with Integer Year/Month, Double TotalRevenue, and Integer OrderCount properties, plus a UNIQUE composite index on (Year, Month). Aggregation filters for paid orders only, groups by Year and Month from the Date field, sums the Price field for TotalRevenue, and counts orders for OrderCount.
